Id: IMMZD2DTCholeraWCRBSVaccine2Doses
Url: IMMZ.D2.DT.Cholera.WC-rBS vaccine 2 doses
Version: 0.2.0
Title: IMMZ.D2.DT.Cholera.WC-rBS vaccine 2 doses
Status: draft
Type:

system: http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/plan-definition-type

code: eca-rule

Date: 2026-04-03 22:35:55+0000
Publisher: WHO
Description:

IMMZ.D2.DT.Cholera.WC-rBS vaccine 2 doses Whole cell-recombinant B subunit (WC-rBS) vaccine, 2-dose schedule for clients aged over 5 years
Knowledge Capability: computable
Related Artifacts:

References

  • WHO recommendations for routine immunization - summary tables (January 2025)
Libraries:
IMMZD2DTCholeraWCRBSVaccine2DosesLogic
Actions:
Determine if the client is due for Cholera.: Determine if the client is due for Cholera vaccine according to the national immunization protocol. Whole cell-recombinant B subunit (WC-rBS) vaccine, 2-dose schedule for clients aged over 5 years
If: Applicability: Client is due for cholera vaccination (Client is due for cholera vaccination)
Then: Definition: IMMZD2DTMR

medication: (Concept { codes: { Code { system: 'http://smart.who.int/immunizations/CodeSystem/IMMZ.Z', code: 'DE2', display: 'Cholera vaccines' } }, display: 'Cholera vaccines' })
Determine if the client is due for Cholera.: Determine if the client is due for Cholera vaccine according to the national immunization protocol. Whole cell-recombinant B subunit (WC-rBS) vaccine, 2-dose schedule for clients aged over 5 years
If: Applicability: Primary series is complete. Client is due for cholera booster dose (Primary series is complete. Client is due for cholera booster dose)
Then: Definition: IMMZD2DTMR

extension.valueString: IMMZEncounterElements
Current Patient Age In Years

/** 
 * @dataElement Patient age in years
 */
define "Current Patient Age In Years":
  AgeInYearsAt(Today)
IMMZD2DTCholeraEncounterElements
Client's age is more than 5 years
IMMZElements
Doses Administered to Patient

/**
 * @dataElement All Doses Administered to Patient
 */
define "Doses Administered to Patient":
  [Immunization] I
    where I.status = 'completed'
    and I.isSubpotent is not true
IMMZEncounterElements
Doses Administered to Patient

/**
 * @dataElement All Doses Administered to Patient
 */
define "Doses Administered to Patient":
  Elements."Doses Administered to Patient" I
    where I.occurrence.toInterval() same day or before Today
IMMZD2DTCholeraEncounterElements
Cholera Doses Administered to Patient

/*
@internal: Cholera containing Doses Administered to Patient
*/
define "Cholera Doses Administered to Patient":
  Encounter."Doses Administered to Patient" I
  where
    I.vaccineCode in Concepts."Cholera vaccines"
IMMZD2DTCholeraEncounterElements
Cholera Primary Series Doses Administered to Patient
IMMZD2DTCholeraEncounterElements
Number of Cholera Primary Series Doses Administered
IMMZD2DTCholeraEncounterElements
No cholera primary series dose was administered
IMMZD2DTCholeraWCRBSVaccine2DosesLogic
Client is due for cholera vaccination Case 1
IMMZD2DTCholeraEncounterElements
At least one cholera primary series dose was administered
IMMZD2DTCholeraEncounterElements
Dose number of the latest primary series dose is one
IMMZD2DTCholeraEncounterElements
Date of Latest Cholera Dose
IMMZD2DTCholeraEncounterElements
The latest cholera dose was administered more than 1 week and less than 6 weeks ago
IMMZD2DTCholeraWCRBSVaccine2DosesLogic
Client is due for cholera vaccination Case 2
IMMZD2DTCholeraEncounterElements
The latest cholera dose was administered more than 6 weeks ago
IMMZD2DTCholeraWCRBSVaccine2DosesLogic
Client is due for cholera vaccination Case 3
IMMZD2DTCholeraEncounterElements
Dose number of the latest primary series dose is more than or equal to two
IMMZD2DTCholeraEncounterElements
The latest cholera dose was administered approximately more than 2 years ago {Member States defined interval}
IMMZD2DTCholeraWCRBSVaccine2DosesLogic
Client is due for cholera vaccination Case 4
IMMZD2DTCholeraWCRBSVaccine2DosesLogic
Client is due for cholera vaccination
IMMZD2DTCholeraWCRBSVaccine2DosesLogic
Client is due for cholera vaccination Guidance

/*
@output: Client is due for cholera vaccination Guidance
@guidance = Should vaccinate client with cholera dose as no cholera doses have been administered.
Check for contraindications.
@guidance = Should vaccinate client with cholera dose as the latest cholera dose was administered in the last 1 to 6 weeks.
Check for contraindications.
@guidance = Should vaccinate client with cholera dose and restart primary series as the latest cholera dose was administered more than 6 weeks ago.
Check for contraindications.
@guidance = Should vaccinate client with cholera dose and restart primary series as the latest cholera dose was administered approximately more than 2 years ago. 
Check for contraindications.
*/
define "Client is due for cholera vaccination Guidance":
  case
    when "Client is due for cholera vaccination Case 1" then 'Should vaccinate client with cholera dose as no cholera doses have been administered.
Check for contraindications.'
    when "Client is due for cholera vaccination Case 2" then 'Should vaccinate client with cholera dose as the latest cholera dose was administered in the last 1 to 6 weeks.
Check for contraindications.'
    when "Client is due for cholera vaccination Case 3" then 'Should vaccinate client with cholera dose and restart primary series as the latest cholera dose was administered more than 6 weeks ago.
Check for contraindications.'
    when "Client is due for cholera vaccination Case 4" then 'Should vaccinate client with cholera dose and restart primary series as the latest cholera dose was administered approximately more than 2 years ago. 
Check for contraindications.'
    else ''
  end
IMMZD2DTCholeraEncounterElements
The latest cholera dose was administered less than 1 week ago
IMMZD2DTCholeraWCRBSVaccine2DosesLogic
Client is not due for cholera vaccination
IMMZD2DTCholeraWCRBSVaccine2DosesLogic
Client is not due for cholera vaccination Guidance
IMMZD2DTCholeraEncounterElements
The latest cholera dose was administered approximately less than 2 years ago {Member States defined interval}
IMMZD2DTCholeraWCRBSVaccine2DosesLogic
Primary series is complete. Client is due for cholera booster dose
IMMZD2DTCholeraWCRBSVaccine2DosesLogic
Primary series is complete. Client is due for cholera booster dose Guidance
IMMZD2DTCholeraWCRBSVaccine2DosesLogic
Guidance

/*
@dynamicValue: Guidance
*/
define "Guidance":
  case 
    when "Client is due for cholera vaccination" then "Client is due for cholera vaccination Guidance"
    when "Client is not due for cholera vaccination" then "Client is not due for cholera vaccination Guidance"
    when "Primary series is complete. Client is due for cholera booster dose" then "Primary series is complete. Client is due for cholera booster dose Guidance" 
    else ''
  end
IMMZD2DTCholeraWCRBSVaccine2DosesLogic
Has Guidance

define "Has Guidance":
  "Guidance" is not null and "Guidance" != ''
IMMZCommon
seriesPrimary

/**
 * @description: Gets the doses from the primary series
 */
define fluent function seriesPrimary(immunizations List<Immunization>):
  immunizations I where
    exists( I.protocolApplied pa where pa.series = 'Primary series' )
FHIRHelpers
ToString
define function ToString(value string): value.value
FHIRHelpers
ToString
define function ToString(value ImmunizationStatus): value.value
FHIRHelpers
ToBoolean
define function ToBoolean(value boolean): value.value
FHIRHelpers
ToConcept

define function ToConcept(concept FHIR.CodeableConcept):
    if concept is null then
        null
    else
        System.Concept {
            codes: concept.coding C return ToCode(C),
            display: concept.text.value
        }
FHIRHelpers
ToCode

define function ToCode(coding FHIR.Coding):
    if coding is null then
        null
    else
        System.Code {
          code: coding.code.value,
          system: coding.system.value,
          version: coding.version.value,
          display: coding.display.value
        }
IMMZCommon
getDose

/**
 * @description: Gets a given immunization from a list that matches the dose number
 */
define fluent function getDose(immunization Immunization, doseNumber String):
  immunization I where
    exists( I.protocolApplied pa where pa.doseNumber = doseNumber )
WHOCommon
mostRecent

define fluent function mostRecent(immunizations List<Immunization>):
  Last(
    immunizations I
      sort by start of occurrence.toInterval()
  )

parameter.name: Primary series is complete. Client is due for cholera booster dose
Client is due for cholera vaccination

name: IMMZD2DTCholeraWCRBSVaccine2Doses
title: IMMZ.D2.DT.Cholera.WC-rBS vaccine 2 doses
description:
IMMZ.D2.DT.Cholera.WC-rBS vaccine 2 doses
Whole cell-recombinant B subunit (WC-rBS) vaccine, 2-dose schedule for clients aged over 5 years

relatedArtifact.citation: WHO recommendations for routine immunization - summary tables (January 2025)

extension.valueMarkdown:
For WC-rBS vaccine (Dukoral), 2 doses should be given to children aged ≥6 years and adults, 
with an interval of 1–6 weeks between doses. If the interval since the last dose ≥ 6 weeks, restart the primary series.
For those aged ≥6 years, if less than 2 years have passed, 1 dose for revaccination. If more than 2 years 
have passed, the primary series of 2 doses should be repeated.
